OpenSoldat Base Content — reference-only provenance record
https://github.com/opensoldat/base
License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)
Upstream legal text: https://github.com/opensoldat/base/blob/master/LICENSE.txt

No OpenSoldat base content is included in DRIVN. This record documents why the
catalog describes the upstream content separately from the MIT-licensed engine.
If content is ever imported later, pin its revision, audit its Credits.md,
include the verbatim license legal code, identify every creator, mark changes,
and provide the source URI before enabling that build.
